diagrams.name: tracer_installation_flow
diagrams.title: Datadog Tracer Installation Flow
diagrams.description: CLI-driven install: parse args, validate options, check prerequisites, download extension, copy files, and update INI

diagrams.title: Datadog Tracer Uninstall Flow
diagrams.description: CLI-driven uninstall: locate PHP binaries, remove extension files, and revert INI settings

diagrams.title: INI Configuration Management Flow
diagrams.description: Reading, listing, getting, and setting INI configuration values via CLI commands

diagrams.title: PHP Binary Discovery and Prerequisite Checking
diagrams.description: Searching for PHP binaries, resolving paths, checking library and extension prerequisites

diagrams.title: Span Creation and Lifecycle
diagrams.description: Starting a span, attaching metadata, updating duration, and closing the span
diagrams.scope: Core span lifecycle in ddtrace extension

diagrams.name: tracer_initialization_and_startup
diagrams.title: Tracer Initialization and Startup Logs
diagrams.description: Tracer bootstrap, integration registration, startup logs emission, and configuration loading

diagrams.name: function_and_method_hooking
diagrams.title: Function and Method Hooking Flow
diagrams.description: Instrumenting user-land functions and methods via hook_function / hook_method and trace_function / trace_method

diagrams.name: distributed_tracing_propagation
diagrams.title: Distributed Tracing Propagation Flow
diagrams.description: Injecting and extracting distributed trace headers across service boundaries

diagrams.name: scope_and_stack_management
diagrams.title: Scope and Span Stack Management
diagrams.description: Creating, switching, and restoring span stacks; managing active scope and span context

diagrams.name: sampling_and_priority
diagrams.title: Sampling and Priority Sampling Flow
diagrams.description: Setting and getting sampling priority, dropping spans, and checking tracer limits

diagrams.name: trace_flush_and_export
diagrams.title: Trace Flush and Export Flow
diagrams.description: Flushing completed traces to the agent via background writer thread

diagrams.name: appsec_event_handling
diagrams.title: AppSec Event Handling and Blocking Flow
diagrams.description: Emitting ASM security events, triggering blocking responses, and handling AppSec rules

diagrams.name: user_tracking_flow
diagrams.title: User Tracking and Authentication Events
diagrams.description: Recording user identity, tracking login success and failure events on the active span

diagrams.name: exception_and_error_handling
diagrams.title: Exception Capture and Error Handling Flow
diagrams.description: Detecting active exceptions, sanitizing stack traces, and attaching error data to spans
diagrams.scope: Exception capture and error span annotation

diagrams.name: opentelemetry_span_builder_flow
diagrams.title: OpenTelemetry SpanBuilder Flow
diagrams.description: Building OTel-compatible spans: setting parent, attributes, links, events, and starting the span

diagrams.title: OpenTelemetry Context and Propagation Flow
diagrams.description: Activating OTel context, resolving current/root context, and injecting/extracting via Propagator

diagrams.name: dogstatsd_metrics_flow
diagrams.title: DogStatsD Metrics Emission Flow
diagrams.description: Emitting custom metrics (count, gauge, histogram, distribution, set) to the StatsD agent

diagrams.name: ip_extraction_and_tagging
diagrams.title: IP Extraction and Header Tagging Flow

diagrams.name: fork_handling_flow
diagrams.title: PHP Process Fork Handling Flow

diagrams.name: test_infrastructure_flow

diagrams.name: gitlab_pipeline_generation
diagrams.title: GitLab CI Pipeline Generation Flow
diagrams.description: Generating GitLab CI YAML for package, appsec, profiler, and tracer jobs from shared templates

diagrams.name: endpoint_collection_flow
diagrams.title: Endpoint Collection and Flushing Flow
